exploration_notes: This is an investigation-only debug task (no code edits to source). The agent must trace the remote-write queue resharding bug through the call chain: WriteStorage.ApplyConfig() creates QueueManagers → QueueManager.Start() launches updateShardsLoop() and reshardLoop() → calculateDesiredShards() uses EWMA rates (dataIn/dataOut via ewma.go) to compute desired shard count → reshardLoop() calls shards.stop() then shards.start() → during stop, context cancellation in runShard() drops in-flight sample
